text.title: Plausible Analytics Setup Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Plausible Analytics Setup end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: deploy-script
step.action: Inject script in <head> with defer; via proxy or subdomain.

step.name: declare-goals
step.action: Add each goal in Plausible UI before traffic hits.

step.name: set-custom-props
step.action: Add custom props for plan/segment; verify no PII.

step.name: issue-shared-links
step.action: Issue scoped shared links per stakeholder.
